title: Loki’s Past Deepens
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows Unknown person #10, Children, Unknown person #11, Hajrudin, Unknown person #12 as The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.
scene: The story turns toward Elbaf’s past, Loki, Rocks, Harald, and the ancient grudges shaping the island’s present conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What are you up to, shaky?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you reckon she quit so she could chase after a man...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Does love always lead to ruin on the Isle of Women?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Like you'd know anything about the pain of love! You crank out kids like popcorn!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyway, I honestly can't imagine her getting LOVESICK...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd never forgive her if she went after Roger!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At least you've only got eyes for me, right, newgate?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I've never been in love with you.

dialogue.speaker: Children
dialogue.text: I'm the popular sensation, Miss Buckin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: No way! Something crazy is happening!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: IN PIRATE ISLAND'S HISTORY, THIS INCIDENT IS SAID TO RANK AMONG THE GREATEST...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even with all that was yet to come...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Thanks for the ride, tritoma, this will do.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The arrival of the world's most beautiful idol...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...caused a commotion in this hive of murderous fiends.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Tears blur my vision, yet her light still blinds me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This land is too filthy for you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Is she real!? Or am I dreamin'?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait a minute! Are 'You joinin' the rocks crew like Gloriosa?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, I just want to live here for a while.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quitting won't matter to the Marines, they'll always be after me since I was a pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I'm gonna hide out here for a while, with all of you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I want to open a store.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Let's grow some flowers for her!:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are you rats makin' such a racket?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The rocks crew is back! This is bad!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't blame her, Cap'N rocks! This was our doing!!

summary: This part advances the Elbaf’s Buried History through 55 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
